message: Hey [Name] - I promise this isn't another "let me pick your brain" message. I've been geeking out on how AI is quietly revolutionizing home services scheduling and I had to reach out. Fellow automation nerd here.

[Name], weird question - what would you do with 15 extra hours a week? Asking because I just helped a plumbing company owner get exactly that. No catch, just genuinely curious if you'd even want that problem solved.
Hi [Name], I know you probably get 47 connection requests a day from people selling stuff. This isn't that. I study how AI helps contractors win back their weekends. Would love to compare notes.

[Name] - Quick confession: I stalked your profile and got genuinely impressed. Running a home services company AND keeping it growing? I work with owners like you on the AI side. Happy to just connect.
[Name], if I told you there's a way to never miss another lead call again - without hiring anyone - you'd probably think it's BS. Fair. But 3 HVAC companies disagree. Worth a connection?
[Name] - I have a strange proposition. I build AI systems for home services companies and I need agency partners who actually care about client results. Your work suggests you're one of them.
Hey [Name], quick hypothetical: if your clients' leads were followed up in under 60 seconds by AI, 24/7... would that make you look like a hero or would it put you out of a job? Genuinely curious.
[Name], I'll keep this short. I've built an AI system that turns your clients' missed calls into booked jobs. Looking for 2-3 agencies to partner with. Your portfolio caught my eye.
Alright [Name], I'm going to be weirdly transparent. I'm an AI automation agency owner looking for marketing agencies to send referrals TO. Yes, to. Interested in hearing how that works?
[Name] - Most AI companies try to replace agencies. I think that's dumb. I'd rather make you indispensable to your clients. 2 minutes to explain?
[Name], random outreach but with purpose - I help SMB owners automate the stuff they hate so they can focus on what they love. Sounds like we serve the same people from different angles.
Hey [Name] - Your coaching clients probably complain about not having enough time, right? What if I could give them 10+ hours back a week with AI? Could make your coaching results look even better.
[Name] - Bold claim incoming: I can make your coaching clients get results 2x faster. Not by changing your coaching - by automating the busywork they're drowning in. Intrigued or annoyed?
[Name], I just want to connect with smart people who help business owners grow. You clearly do. I do it through AI automation. No pitch, just professional respect.

[Name] - Here's something your coaching clients probably haven't considered: AI can handle their follow-ups, scheduling, and lead response while they sleep. I'd love to be a resource for your community.

Thanks for connecting, [Name]! As promised, no sales pitch. Quick question though - what's your biggest headache right now? Missed calls? Scheduling chaos? Finding good techs? I ask because I've spent the last 2 years building AI systems specifically for home services companies, and the problems are hilariously consistent. If any of that resonates, happy to share what's working.

[Name]! Appreciate the connect. So here's the deal - I built an AI receptionist that answers calls, books jobs, and follows up with leads for home services companies. One client went from missing 40% of calls to missing zero. I'm not trying to sell you anything today - but if missed revenue from missed calls keeps you up at night, I have ideas. Worth a quick chat?

Hey [Name], thanks for connecting! Random but relevant: I just helped a plumbing company save $4,200/month by replacing their answering service with AI. Took 3 days to set up. I'm collecting case studies in home services right now - would you be open to a free audit of where AI could save you the most time and money? Zero obligation, genuinely just building my portfolio.

[Name] - glad we connected! I'll be honest, I reached out because I think there's a massive opportunity in home services that most owners don't know about yet. AI can now answer your phones, qualify leads, book appointments, and follow up - all while sounding completely human. I'm not selling anything. I just love talking about this stuff. Would you be open to seeing a 2-min demo?

Hey [Name]! Quick thought after connecting - I noticed you run a [specific] company in [area]. I've been working with similar companies and noticed they all share the same 3 problems: missed calls after hours, slow follow-up on leads, and drowning in admin. Sound familiar? If even one of those hit home, I have a pretty elegant AI solution. No pitch - just a conversation.

[Name] - thanks for connecting! Here's my unusual offer: I build AI systems for home services companies (think AI receptionists, automated follow-up, lead qualification). I need marketing agencies to refer clients to. In return, you get a partner who makes your client results look phenomenal AND a rev share. I know it sounds too good - happy to explain the model on a quick call.

Hey [Name], appreciate the connect! So here's why I reached out - your agency generates leads for clients, right? Here's the brutal truth: most of those leads die because the client takes 4+ hours to follow up. My AI follows up in under 60 seconds. Imagine telling your clients their lead-to-appointment rate just doubled. That's the pitch to YOU, not your clients. Interested?

[Name]! So glad we connected. Quick context: I run an AI automation agency focused on home services. Here's why that matters to YOU - your clients are probably wasting 30-50% of the leads you generate for them because their follow-up is too slow. My AI fixes that in 48 hours. Net result: your agency looks like wizards, clients stay longer, everyone wins. Want the full picture?

Thanks for connecting, [Name]! I have a weird business model I'd love your take on. I partner with marketing agencies and add an AI layer to their client delivery - instant lead follow-up, appointment booking, missed call recovery. The agency gets better results, happier clients, and I handle all the tech. You literally just introduce me. Is this interesting or am I dreaming?

[Name] - real talk. I see a lot of agencies struggling to prove ROI to clients. What if you could show them that 95% of their leads now get contacted within 60 seconds? That's what my AI does. I'm looking for 3 agency partners this quarter. No cost to you - I work directly with your clients and you get the credit. Too good? Let me prove it.

[Name], thanks for connecting! Here's why I think we should actually talk: your coaching clients want more time and more revenue. My AI systems literally create both - automated follow-up, scheduling, lead response. What if you could recommend a solution to your clients that solves their #1 complaint (not enough time) AND makes your coaching results accelerate? I'd love to explore a referral partnership.

Hey [Name]! Glad we connected. Quick insight from my world: I build AI automation for SMBs, and I keep hearing the same thing - 'My coach told me to systematize but I don't know how.' That's where I come in. Would you be open to being the coach who can actually hand clients a done-for-them automation solution? I think there's a genuine partnership here.

[Name] - so here's a thought. Your clients hire you to grow their business. But growth creates chaos unless systems are in place, right? I automate the chaos part. AI that handles their calls, leads, scheduling, follow-up. Imagine being the coach who doesn't just teach strategy but hands them the infrastructure to execute it. Want to jam on this for 10 min?

Thanks for the connect, [Name]! I'll cut to it - I think business coaches are sitting on an untapped goldmine. Your clients trust you more than anyone. If you could recommend an AI system that saves them 10+ hours/week (and I can prove it does), that's a massive win for everyone. I'm building a referral program specifically for coaches. Interested in being one of the first?

[Name]! So we connected and now the awkward 'what do we talk about' part. Here's my take: you coach SMB owners. I automate SMB operations with AI. Together, your clients get strategy AND execution in one package. I'm not trying to sell to your clients behind your back - I want to build something with you. Coffee chat this week?

Hey [Name], no worries if my last message got buried - I know running a home services company means your inbox looks like a war zone. Just wanted to share this quick: one of my HVAC clients just told me the AI system I built him saved his first $10K in missed revenue last month alone. If that number interests you even slightly, I'm around. If not, no hard feelings at all.

[Name] - following up because I genuinely think you're leaving money on the table (and I hate seeing that). Quick stat: the average home services company misses 30-50% of inbound calls. At $500+ per job, that's $15K-$25K/month walking away. My AI catches every single one. If you've got 5 minutes this week, I'll show you exactly how it works. If the timing's off, just say so.

[Name], last nudge from me (promise). I just published a free breakdown showing how 3 home services companies are using AI to book 40% more jobs without hiring anyone. No opt-in, no funnel, just a Google Doc. Want the link? Either way, wishing you a killer quarter.

Hey [Name], circling back one more time. I noticed your company has great reviews - clearly you deliver. The question is: are you capturing every potential customer who tries to reach you? Most home services companies aren't, and it's costing them $10K-$30K/month. I built something that fixes that in 48 hours. Happy to show you, or happy to just be a connection. Your call.

[Name], I'll keep this to 10 seconds of your time: AI receptionist. Answers every call. Books every job. Costs less than a part-time hire. 3-day setup. I have a demo with your company name on it if you want to see it in action. If not, I'll stop bugging you. Deal?

[Name], circling back on my AI partnership idea. Here's something that might change your mind: I just helped an agency add $4K/month in recurring revenue by white-labeling my AI lead follow-up system to their clients. Zero extra work for them. I know you're busy - but is 'extra recurring revenue with no extra work' something worth 10 minutes to explore?

Hey [Name], quick follow-up. I realized I buried the lead last time. Here's the simple version: I build AI that makes your clients' leads convert faster. You introduce me. I do all the work. You get rev share. Your clients love you more. I'm already doing this with 2 agencies and it's working stupidly well. Want in?

[Name] - last attempt, I promise. Here's the elevator pitch: your agency generates leads. My AI converts them 3x faster. Together, your clients get insane ROI and you look like a genius. I handle setup, support, everything. You just make the intro. If this sounds interesting, reply with literally anything and I'll send details. If not, I respect that.

[Name], I keep thinking about something Jay Abraham said: 'The fastest way to grow is to help someone else grow first.' That's my approach. I want to make your agency more valuable to your clients by adding AI-powered lead response. No cost to you. I'm not being altruistic - I get clients. But you get better retention and new revenue. Win-win or am I crazy?

Last message from me, [Name] - I put together a 1-page doc showing how agency + AI partnership works (with real numbers from 2 current partners). No strings, no pitch call required. Want me to send it over? If the answer is no, I'll gracefully bow out and just enjoy your content from afar.

Hey [Name], following up because I think there's a real opportunity we're both missing. What if your coaching program included done-for-you AI automation? Client gets strategy from you + execution from me. You differentiate from every other coach. I differentiate from every other AI company. Shall we explore this?

[Name], quick update - I just launched a partner program specifically for business coaches. The gist: you recommend my AI automation to your SMB clients, I give them a VIP setup, and you earn a referral fee on every client. Three coaches have already joined. Spots aren't unlimited. Worth a look?

[Name] - I'll make this my last follow-up. I wrote a short case study about how a business coach added AI automation as part of their client offering and increased retention by 35%. It's a 3-min read. Happy to share if you're curious, or I'll leave you in peace. Either way, keep doing great work.

Hey [Name], tapping out after this one. Simple question: do your coaching clients struggle with lead follow-up and admin? If yes, I have a 'plug and play' AI solution they'd love. If no, you have incredible clients and I'm jealous. Either way, appreciate the connection.

[Name], I noticed you just posted about [topic]. Great stuff. Related thought: what if your clients could automate everything you teach them about systems and processes? I build the AI infrastructure that makes coaching advice instantly actionable. I genuinely think we could create something special together. Last pitch - promise.

summary: Run 1 baseline complete. Generated 45 messages. Discarded 2 (generic flattery and weak curiosity). Strongest patterns: buchan_radical_transparency (9.0 avg), buchan_hypothetical + abraham_leverage (8.4), content_lead + graceful_exit (8.4). Weakest criteria across batch: curiosity (avg 7.0). Run 2 will mutate for stronger curiosity hooks.

Run 3 will generate first_dm and follow_up_dm variations with same curiosity emphasis while recovering authenticity.
